title: Document advisor_scout schema extension in canonical lug spec
perceive: The lug schema has evolved to support advisor lifecycle management with new fields (advisor_scout, advisor_id, scout_reason), but this extension is not yet documented in the canonical lug spec. Active advisor-scout lugs use these fields correctly, but future implementations lack formal reference.
execute: 1. Create canonical lug spec for advisor_scout pattern. Define required fields: advisor_scout (boolean), advisor_id (string), scout_reason (string).
2. Document the advisor warming lifecycle: stub → scheduled → run → last_run_at updated.
3. Create spec as type:spec lug in lugs/bytype/spec/open/. Add entry to WAI-SpecIndex.jsonl with subject_id='lug-schema-advisor-scout'.
4. Link from CLAUDE.md Man Lug System section as reference for future advisor implementations.
verify: Spec lug exists at lugs/bytype/spec/open/ with complete field definitions. WAI-SpecIndex.jsonl includes entry. New advisor-scout lugs validate against spec without warnings.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical spec exists with all advisor_scout fields documented
Spec indexed in WAI-SpecIndex.jsonl for grep-ability
Schema validation enforces advisor_scout fields on affected lug types
